MediaPipeFaceMeshDetector.kt - extracts 468 face landmarks\\n5. LipRegionExtractor.kt - crops mouth ROI 128x64 grayscale\\n6. ONNXInferenceEngine.kt - loads lip-reading ONNX model, runs inference\\n7. TextDecoder.kt - CTC/greedy decode to text\\n8. LipReadViewModel.kt - exposes recognizedText state\\n9. ResultOverlayView.kt - custom view to display text overlay\\n10. FrameBuffer.kt - circular buffer for temporal frames\\n\\nAlso generate:\\n- app/build.gradle.kts with all dependencies \(CameraX 1.3.4, MediaPipe 0.10.28, ONNX Runtime 1.17.1\)\\n- build.gradle.kts \(root\)\\n- settings.gradle.kts\\n- AndroidManifest.xml with CAMERA permission\\n- activity_main.xml layout\\n\\nSave all files to projects/lip-reading-android/. Model from https://github.com/liwt2010/lip-reading","agent":"tech"}')
